message:
test(core): extend proptest coverage for runtime enforcement (ft-2p9cb.1.3.3)

12 new proptests: MitigationLevel roundtrip/serde/severity monotonicity,
PolicyConstraint clamp bounded/allows consistent, RuntimeEnforcer observation
count/escalation bounded/recovery bounded/no escalation within budget/
enforce_run count/decision serde/snapshot serde. 67 proptests total + 148
unit tests = 215 tests, all passing.
